name: 生物防害专家 | 特警
nameZh: 生物防害专家 | 特警
descriptionEn: The SWAT's Biological Hazard Specialists are trained to handle worst case bio warfare situations. Terrorists planning to unleash a bio hazard attack upon unsuspecting civilians do not want to deal with these guys. Tacita Sed Mortiferum.
descriptionZh: 这位特警队里的生物防害专家，接受过培训，可以处理哪怕最坏情况的生物战。对于那些计划向毫无戒备的普通百姓进行生害攻击的T来说，这些生物防害专家简直就是最头痛的对手。 安静但致命！
